description: Document attachment evaluation test cases for LiveKit text-only agent

test_cases.description: Test Q&A on a quarterly business report PDF

questions.query: What is the total revenue mentioned in this report?
questions.ground_truth: The total revenue for Q4 2025 was $12.5 million, representing a 15% increase from the previous quarter.

questions.query: What were the key challenges mentioned?
questions.ground_truth: The report highlights supply chain disruptions, increased raw material costs, and talent acquisition as the main challenges faced during the quarter.

questions.query: What are the projected goals for next quarter?
questions.ground_truth: The company aims to achieve 20% revenue growth, expand into two new markets, and launch three new product lines in the upcoming quarter.

test_cases.description: Test Q&A on API technical specification document

questions.query: What authentication method does the API use?
questions.ground_truth: The API uses OAuth 2.0 with JWT tokens for authentication. Access tokens expire after 1 hour and refresh tokens are valid for 30 days.

questions.query: What is the rate limit for API requests?
questions.ground_truth: The standard rate limit is 1000 requests per minute per API key. Enterprise plans have a limit of 10,000 requests per minute.

test_cases.description: Test Q&A on meeting notes text file

questions.ground_truth: The meeting was attended by John Smith (CEO), Sarah Johnson (CTO), Mike Brown (CFO), and Emily Davis (Product Lead).
Action items include: Sarah to complete technical review by Jan 15, Mike to prepare budget proposal by Jan 20, and Emily to finalize product roadmap by Jan 25.

questions.query: When is the next meeting scheduled?
questions.ground_truth: The next meeting is scheduled for January 30, 2026 at 2:00 PM in the main conference room.

test_cases.description: Test Q&A on machine learning research paper

questions.query: What is the main contribution of this paper?
questions.ground_truth: The paper introduces a novel transformer architecture that reduces computational complexity from O(n²) to O(n log n) while maintaining comparable accuracy on benchmark tasks.

questions.query: What datasets were used for evaluation?
questions.ground_truth: The model was evaluated on ImageNet, COCO, and the custom SyntheticVision dataset, achieving state-of-the-art results on two of three benchmarks.

test_cases.description: Test Q&A on service agreement contract

questions.query: What is the contract term and renewal policy?
questions.ground_truth: The initial contract term is 12 months, with automatic renewal for successive 12-month periods unless either party provides 30 days written notice before expiration.
Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date. Late payments incur a 1.5% monthly interest charge. Annual prepayment receives a 10% discount.

questions.query: What is the liability cap mentioned?
questions.ground_truth: The total liability is capped at the fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim, excluding cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.
